findings.title: No pre-commit hooks, CODEOWNERS, or GitHub Actions exist despite being referenced as enforced controls
findings.detail: Multiple files assert that pre-commit hooks enforce secret-pattern rejection and that CODEOWNERS + a dedicated GitHub Action enforce the Protected Paths auto-merge gate. However, the enforcement files did not exist. This meant the entire security enforcement layer was aspirational documentation, not reality.
findings.fix_sketch: Wire .husky/pre-commit, .github/CODEOWNERS, .github/workflows/protected-paths.yml, and .claude/settings.json.

findings.title: Sprint SPRINT-2026-05-A ends today (2026-05-20) but repo has had zero updates since initial scaffold on 2026-05-15
findings.detail: The sprint defined in SPRINT.md ended with zero feature commits in this repo. Factory coordination docs were 5 days stale on sprint-end day.
findings.fix_sketch: Reconcile SPRINT/ROADMAP/STATUS to git reality without fabricating progress.

findings.title: ENV.md missing Stripe and Documenso secret_refs that INTEGRATIONS.md declares
findings.detail: INTEGRATIONS.md declares STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, and DOCUMENSO_API_KEY but none were present in ENV.md rotation calendar or var tables.
findings.fix_sketch: Add rows for all four vars with scope/rotation/consumed_by. Add to rotation calendar.

findings.title: ADR-0006 contains a lazy reference 'NG-something equivalent' instead of citing the actual Non-Goal ID
findings.detail: In docs/decisions/0006-retell-default-voice.md, the ADR contains 'NG-something equivalent' as an unresolved placeholder. Per append-only invariant, cannot edit the accepted ADR body. Must append an erratum.
findings.fix_sketch: Append an erratum clarifying the reference points to SPRINT.md §No-gos item 5.

findings.title: ROADMAP 'Not Doing' section only covers 6 of 10 No-Gos from NON_GOALS.md
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md Not Doing section listed only 6 of 10 No-Gos, missing NG-5, NG-7, NG-8, NG-9, NG-10. Incomplete enumeration creates false sense of coverage for workers using ROADMAP as their only reference.
findings.fix_sketch: Replace with a pointer to NON_GOALS.md as the canonical source.

findings.title: README.md references stale IFleet status memory file (2026-05-13), missing the 2026-05-19 launch
findings.detail: README.md hardcoded a stale memory file path. IFleet launched 2026-05-19 but README pointed to pre-launch status.
findings.fix_sketch: Replace hardcoded path with a note to check MEMORY.md index. Update IFleet status row.

findings.title: SECURITY.md security.txt references unresolved TBD URLs that will break RFC 9116 compliance
findings.detail: security.txt block contained '(TBD)' suffixes on Encryption and Policy URLs. RFC 9116 requires all listed URLs to be valid — (TBD) makes them syntactically invalid.
findings.fix_sketch: Remove (TBD) entries from security.txt block; add explanatory note to add lines when URLs are live.

findings.title: costs.json references IFleet PR #39 as the cost tracker but this is a coordination-only repo with no cost enforcement mechanism
findings.detail: costs.json _notes claimed 'Totals recomputed by IFleet cost tracker (PR #39) on every write' — this repo cannot be written to by IFleet across repo boundaries.
findings.fix_sketch: Correct the note to clarify Factory-repo-only tracking and remove cross-repo IFleet reference.

findings.title: CHANGELOG.md ADR-0010 missing from the Decisions subsection
findings.detail: ADR-0010 was missing from CHANGELOG Decisions subsection. Verified fixed in the 2026-05-23 audit run (line 40 now present). Status was not updated in index.json.
findings.fix_sketch: Already fixed. Status update only.

findings.title: ROADMAP 'Not Doing' duplicates the same No-Go in two differently-worded bullets
findings.detail: Two bullets expressed the same NoGo-1 with different framing. Fixed as part of replacing the Not Doing section.
findings.fix_sketch: Fixed via pointer-to-NON_GOALS.md replacement.

findings.title: Retell platform decision marked pending but architecture treats it as locked — no deadline for R1 confirmation
findings.detail: ADR-0006 title says 'pending Esme R1 confirmation'. SPRINT-2026-05-A ended without R1 research. As of 2026-05-26, 11 days past sprint end, confirmation is still pending with no deadline set and no active sprint to schedule it.
findings.fix_sketch: Add explicit deadline for R1 confirmation in ROADMAP.md open questions. Escalate if SPRINT-2026-05-B doesn't schedule this.

findings.title: RUNBOOK SLOs are TBD with no process to define them before first incident
findings.detail: RUNBOOK.md trigger rules reference TBD per-product SLOs. No SLO is defined for any Factory service. Operators cannot determine incident severity or correct escalation path without these.
findings.fix_sketch: Add Factory SLOs section to RUNBOOK.md before M-016. Derive escalation SLA thresholds from SLOs explicitly.

findings.title: Logging cross-cutting concern undefined — no schema, levels, or PII rules across per-client repos
findings.detail: ARCHITECTURE.md §6 lists logging as a cross-cutting concern but no document defines log schema, level taxonomy, or PII redaction rules. Per-client repos will define logging ad-hoc, violating Architectural Invariant 10.
findings.fix_sketch: Add minimal logging standard to AGENTS.md §6 or create ADR-0011 covering structured JSON logs, severity levels, PII redaction fields, and Sentry + stdout pattern.

findings.title: 13 of 18 spec files have last_updated 2026-05-15 despite 2026-05-21 and 2026-05-23 audit activity
findings.detail: Most spec files had last_updated: 2026-05-15. Fixed by bulk updating 13 files to 2026-05-26 in this audit session.
findings.fix_sketch: Bulk update last_updated to 2026-05-26 for all files reviewed.

findings.title: Protected Paths glob **/auth/** present in SECURITY.md but missing from CODEOWNERS and protected-paths workflow
findings.detail: SECURITY.md line 67 lists '**/auth/**' as a Protected Path but neither CODEOWNERS nor the workflow included it. Both used non-standard '**/(auth)/**' which matches literal parenthesized directory names, not standard auth directories.
findings.fix_sketch: Add '**/auth/**' to CODEOWNERS and workflow paths list alongside existing '**/(auth)/**'.

findings.title: SPRINT-2026-05-B referenced in multiple files but never created — coordination repo has no active sprint
findings.detail: SPRINT.md, ROADMAP.md, CHANGELOG.md, and .omc/STATUS.md all reference SPRINT-2026-05-B as pending since 2026-05-21. As of 2026-05-26, no SPRINT-2026-05-B exists. Workers have no work queue.
findings.fix_sketch: STATUS.md updated to flag this explicitly. Full SPRINT-2026-05-B is a human decision requiring Sebastian + Esme alignment.

findings.title: ENV.md 'Last verified' date (2026-05-15) does not match 'last_updated' frontmatter (2026-05-26)
findings.detail: ENV.md frontmatter says last_updated: 2026-05-26 (when Stripe/Documenso vars were added) but the footer 'Last verified' still said 2026-05-15. Updated to 2026-05-30.
findings.fix_sketch: Update footer Last verified date to match last_updated.

findings.title: STATUS.md 'In flight' section references audit/nightly-2026-05-26 as push-pending — 4 days stale
findings.detail: The In-flight entry for audit/nightly-2026-05-26 was created on 2026-05-26 and referenced a push that has since completed. Updated STATUS.md to reflect the current nightly run.
findings.fix_sketch: Replace stale In-flight entry with current nightly audit branch.

findings.title: KPI.md OKRs carry stale due dates (KR1 due 2026-05-20, KR2 due 2026-05-27) with no update
findings.detail: KR1 deadline passed 6 days ago (missed). KR2 deadline is tomorrow with no active sprint. OKRs updated to reflect actual status: KR1 marked missed, KR2 marked at-risk.
findings.fix_sketch: Mark KR1 as missed, KR2 at-risk, update confidence scores to reflect reality.

findings.title: ROADMAP last_updated frontmatter says 2026-05-21 but footer says 2026-05-15
findings.detail: Frontmatter and footer showed contradictory dates. Footer updated to match.
findings.fix_sketch: Update footer to match frontmatter date.

findings.title: SECURITY.md footer 'Last updated' says 2026-05-15 despite frontmatter showing 2026-05-21
findings.detail: Frontmatter and footer showed contradictory dates. Footer updated to 2026-05-26.
findings.fix_sketch: Update SECURITY.md footer to current date.

findings.title: ADR-0006 (accepted) was directly edited to add an Erratum section, violating the append-only rule
ROADMAP 'Next cycle' window (2026-05-21 → 2026-06-04) expired today with no completion evidence and no reconciliation banner
KPI.md KR4 deadline (2026-06-04) passed today with confidence=6 and no active sprint
AGENTS.md §8 cites 'NON_GOALS.md NG-7' as 'smoke-test-first rationale' but NG-7 is a sprint-scoped test-debt trade-off
UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md 'Protected Path' lists ADR-0001 as its source, but ADR-0001 does not define Protected Paths
SECURITY.md Killswitches references M-019 for Discord command bridge but M-019 is the cost-tracking dashboard
ROADMAP M-015 depends-on field uses non-parseable range syntax '[M-001 through M-014]'
AGENTS.md §2 required reading list has 18 items but context refers to '17 spec files'; CLAUDE.md not clarified as bridge-only
ADR-0002 title says 'Four-repo structure' but subtitle lists five distinct repo types
CHANGELOG.md initial scaffold entry states '22 domain terms + 24 events' but UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md now has 27 terms + 26 events
Gap numbering in ROADMAP is non-sequential vs the Gap glossary ordered list
INTEGRATIONS.md Anthropic Claude entry references 'Phase B decision' without a cross-reference
ARCHITECTURE.md frontmatter related_adrs omits ADR-0005 and ADR-0009 which are referenced in its body
UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md Sprint entry source says 'ADR-0008-ish (Shape Up adopted; full ADR pending)' — placeholder 20 days stale
NON_GOALS.md NoGo-1 cites ADR-0004 as its source but ADR-0004 is about build-first sprint strategy, not productization scope
ADR-0006 frontmatter uses non-standard status value 'superseded by ADR-0011'
findings.detail: Status field contained extra text 'by ADR-0011' making it non-standard per MADR template. The superseding relationship is captured in ADR-0011's supersedes field.

findings.title: DECISIONS.md status lifecycle description endorses non-standard 'superseded by NNNN' format
findings.detail: DECISIONS.md sections 3 and 4 described the status lifecycle as 'superseded by NNNN', perpetuating the non-standard format. Corrected to 'superseded'.
